title: run_linux: fix tight loop if file is not pollable
body:
do not attempt again to poll the file if it is not pollable and the
the errno is not syscall.EINTR or syscall.EAGAIN.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/2194

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
LGTM
FWIW, I'd lean to the errors.Cause too

@giuseppe Could you rebase and we can merge.  Bors is not happy and I am not sure why.
bors retry
